{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323164857E85DCFCEBA93E6E4779D"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7507969000914043710","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"少有的狗血剧情，人与人之间都挺温暖"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748091645,"group_id":"7268975275751246908","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0mbbk5a0jkd8svPQ460eWaov470PZaR32k4sAFYfPM+","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2597490959595956","user_name":"龙井里的暮小苍"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2597490959595956","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7268975275751246908","book_info":{"abstract":"作精专业户完成了3次系统任务后要退休了，谁料系统出bug，又穿了。
再睁眼，土铺的地，泥抹的墙，双手一拍就跑灰的炕席。
“宿主，种田系统已开启，种一亩地奖励10积分哦~”
柳芽看着一亩地都不趁的家，破口大骂。
没办法，撸起袖子重头再来吧。
没钱买地？拿野木薯食用方法去换。
没钱雇人？把系统出品红宝石卖了。
朝廷没人被欺负？俩弟弟还不大，一文一武正好培养。
能活着了，就想要活的更精致一些，于是接下来开始新的一轮——
路不平，自己修！
车太颠，自己改！
房子太破，自己建！
本为了生活巴适一些，一不小心成了全国首富。
名下绣楼、饭庄、装修队、船队不计其数。
最后皇帝也来凑热闹，“柳夫人有大才啊，岂能不为朝廷效力。”
